mapper.select:
SELECT id, tcm_symptom_id, symptom_name_zh, symptom_pinyin, symptom_definition, symptom_locus, symptom_property, type FROM tcm_symptoms
AND ( symptom_name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR symptom_pinyin LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND symptom_locus = #{locus}
AND type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{type}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, tcm_symptom_id, symptom_name_zh, symptom_pinyin, symptom_definition, symptom_locus, symptom_property, type FROM tcm_symptoms WHERE tcm_symptom_id = #{tcmSymptomId}

SELECT h.id, h.tcm_herb_id AS tcmHerbId, h.herb_name_zh AS herbNameZh, h.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, h.latin_name AS latinName, h.english_name AS englishName, h.type, h.efficacy_zh AS efficacyZh, h.function_en AS functionEn, h.efficacy_category AS efficacyCategory FROM core_tcm_herbs h INNER JOIN herb_symptom_rel hs ON h.tcm_herb_id = hs.tcm_herb_id WHERE hs.tcm_symptom_id = #{tcmSymptomId} ORDER BY h.id ASC

SELECT p.id, p.tcm_prescription_id AS tcmPrescriptionId, p.name_zh AS nameZh, p.pinyin_name AS pinyinName, p.source, p.indications_zh AS indicationsZh, p.indications_en AS indicationsEn, p.effects, p.effects_zh AS effectsZh FROM tcm_prescriptions p INNER JOIN prescription_symptom_rel ps ON p.tcm_prescription_id = ps.tcm_prescription_id WHERE ps.tcm_symptom_id = #{tcmSymptomId} ORDER BY p.id ASC

SELECT syn.id, syn.tcm_syndrome_id AS tcmSyndromeId, syn.syndrome_name_zh AS syndromeNameZh, syn.syndrome_english AS syndromeEnglish, syn.syndrome_pinyin AS syndromePinyin, syn.syndrome_definition_zh AS syndromeDefinitionZh, syn.syndrome_description_en AS syndromeDescriptionEn, syn.category_zh AS categoryZh, syn.category_en AS categoryEn, syn.source FROM tcm_syndromes syn INNER JOIN syndrome_symptom_rel ss ON syn.tcm_syndrome_id = ss.tcm_syndrome_id WHERE ss.tcm_symptom_id = #{tcmSymptomId} ORDER BY syn.id ASC

SELECT s.id, s.tcm_symptom_id AS tcmSymptomId, s.symptom_name_zh AS symptomNameZh, s.symptom_pinyin AS symptomPinyin, s.symptom_definition AS symptomDefinition, s.symptom_locus AS symptomLocus, s.symptom_property AS symptomProperty, s.type FROM tcm_symptoms s INNER JOIN herb_symptom_rel hs ON s.tcm_symptom_id = hs.tcm_symptom_id WHERE hs.tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId} ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT wm.id, wm.wm_symptom_id AS wmSymptomId, wm.symptom_name AS symptomName, wm.umls_id AS umlsId FROM wm_symptoms wm INNER JOIN tcm_wm_symptom_rel rel ON wm.wm_symptom_id = rel.wm_symptom_id WHERE rel.tcm_symptom_id = #{tcmSymptomId} ORDER BY wm.id ASC
